tldr_zh: OpenAI推醫療功能、Anthropic升級語音、AMD挑戰Nvidia，AI應用加速擴展。
tldr_en: OpenAI launches Health feature, Anthropic upgrades voice mode, AMD challenges Nvidia with new AI systems.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出ChatGPT健康功能，美國用戶可安全連接醫療記錄
items.title_en: OpenAI Launches Health in ChatGPT for US Users
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出Health功能，讓合格的美國用戶可安全連接醫療記錄與Apple Health，獲得更個人化的健康洞察。這標誌著AI在醫療保健應用中的重要進展，將AI的實際應用擴展至個人健康管理領域。
items.summary_en: OpenAI's new Health feature enables eligible US users to securely connect medical records and Apple Health data to ChatGPT for personalized health insights. This marks a significant expansion of AI applications into personal healthcare management.

items.title_zh: Anthropic Claude語音模式升級，Opus和Sonnet模型現已推出
items.title_en: Anthropic Expands Claude Voice Mode to Opus and Sonnet Models
items.summary_zh: Anthropic將語音模式從Haiku模型擴展至更強大的Opus和Sonnet模型，並整合Gmail、Slack和Canva等應用。這一升級使高端Claude模型具備多模態交互能力，增強企業用戶體驗。
items.summary_en: Anthropic now offers voice mode for its more powerful Claude Opus and Sonnet models, integrating with apps like Gmail, Slack, and Canva. This expansion brings advanced conversational AI capabilities to more demanding enterprise use cases.

items.title_zh: Google推出Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber資安模型，加速漏洞修補
items.title_en: Google Launches Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber for Security Vulnerability Detection
items.summary_zh: Google推出針對資安任務優化的輕量化模型Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber，專門用於快速發現、驗證與修補軟體漏洞。該模型透過CodeMender代理以限制存取方式提供給政府與信任夥伴，展示AI在網絡安全領域的實際應用。
items.summary_en: Google unveiled Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber, a specialized lightweight model optimized for cybersecurity tasks including vulnerability detection and remediation. The model is available through CodeMender with limited access for government and trusted partners.

items.title_zh: AMD發表Helios機櫃和新一代Instinct MI400系列，挑戰Nvidia
items.title_en: AMD Launches Helios Rack System and Instinct MI400 Series to Challenge Nvidia
items.summary_zh: AMD推出採用台積電2奈米製程的Instinct MI400系列加速器（包括MI430X和MI455X）與Helios機櫃系統，目標鎖定AI推論市場。AMD執行長蘇姿丰表示2026年AI推論與訓練需求比約為6:4，推動AI計算重心轉向推論應用。
items.summary_en: AMD unveiled its new Instinct MI400 series accelerators and Helios rack-scale system using TSMC's 2nm process, targeting the growing AI inference market. The company projects a 6:4 ratio of inference to training workloads in 2026, challenging Nvidia's dominance.

items.title_zh: Google被EU罰款10億美元，數位市場法下第三大科技巨頭受罰
items.title_en: Google Fined $1 Billion by EU Under Digital Markets Act
items.summary_zh: Google因違反歐盟數位市場法（Digital Markets Act）被罰款10億美元，成為該法下第三個遭重罰的大型科技公司。這反映歐盟對科技巨頭壟斷行為的持續監管力度。
items.summary_en: Google received a $1 billion fine from the EU under the Digital Markets Act, becoming the third major tech giant to face significant penalties. This reflects the EU's continued enforcement of competition regulations.

items.title_zh: AI幫助科學家加速藥物開發，新一代醫療成為可能
items.title_en: AI Accelerates Next Generation Medicine Design and Development
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工評論報導AI如何幫助科學家設計生物製劑和新藥物。AI技術能大幅縮短新藥開發周期，提高成功率，是製藥產業轉型的關鍵技術。
items.summary_en: MIT Technology Review explores how AI assists scientists in designing next-generation medicines, particularly biologic therapies. AI significantly accelerates drug development timelines and improves candidate success rates.

items.title_zh: Google推出自拍登入功能，無需密碼即可帳戶驗證
items.title_en: Google Introduces Selfie Video Login Authentication
items.summary_zh: Google現允許用戶使用自拍影片進行帳戶登入、AI化身驗證和年齡驗證。這一創新的生物識別驗證方式提升了帳戶安全性與使用者體驗。
items.summary_en: Google now enables users to log into accounts using selfie videos, extending the technology to AI Avatars and age verification. This biometric authentication method enhances account security and user convenience.

items.title_zh: Amazon Alexa Plus更新支持更多智能家居裝置，AI功能升級
items.title_en: Amazon Alexa Plus AI Update Enhances Smart Home Integration
items.summary_zh: Amazon推出Alexa Plus更新，現可連接Bosch、iRobot、Yale Home等多個品牌的智能家居裝置，並自動路由用戶請求。升級後Alexa Plus能處理更複雜的指令，提升智能家居控制體驗。
items.summary_en: Amazon's Alexa Plus update enables connections with smart home devices from Bosch, Delta, iRobot, Yale Home, and others, with automatic request routing. The enhanced AI can handle more complex instructions across multiple device ecosystems.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出企業AI代理Presence，客服自動化率達75%
items.title_en: OpenAI Launches Presence Enterprise AI Agent for Customer Service
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出Presence企業AI代理，可處理客服、外撥銷售等任務，自動化率達75%，遇到複雜情況才轉交真人。該產品代表AI在企業運營自動化中的實際應用突破。
items.summary_en: OpenAI launched Presence, an enterprise AI agent that automates 75% of customer service cases through voice and text interactions. The system can answer questions, access enterprise systems, and escalate complex issues to human agents.

items.title_zh: Oracle 7月更新修補超過1000個漏洞，創紀錄數量
items.title_en: Oracle Patches Record 1,000+ Vulnerabilities in July Update
items.summary_zh: Oracle在第3季例行更新中修補超過1000個安全漏洞，創下公司歷史新紀錄。這反映出當前軟體安全漏洞的嚴重程度與修補的緊迫性。
items.summary_en: Oracle's quarterly update addressed over 1,000 security vulnerabilities, setting a record for the company. The large number reflects the complexity of modern enterprise software and ongoing security challenges.

items.title_zh: 中東局勢升溫推升油價破百美元，金融市場面臨雙重衝擊
items.title_en: Middle East Escalation Drives Oil Above $100 for First Time Since May
items.summary_zh: 布蘭特原油價格在中東戰局升高下突破每桶100美元，創五月以來新高。長期公債殖利率也隨之走高，突破5%，衝擊全球金融市場與經濟前景。
items.summary_en: Brent crude oil rose above $100 per barrel for the first time since May amid escalating Middle East tensions. Long-term US Treasury yields also surpassed 5%, impacting financial markets and global economic growth prospects.

items.title_zh: 川普稱習近平9月訪美，將討論AI議題
items.title_en: Trump Announces Xi Jinping's September Visit to Discuss AI Issues
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普表示中國主席習近平將於9月24日訪美，屆時將討論人工智慧相關議題。這反映AI已成為美中戰略對話的重要議題。
items.summary_en: US President Trump announced that China's President Xi Jinping will visit America on September 24, with plans to discuss AI-related issues. The statement highlights AI's growing importance in US-China strategic dialogue.
